state: local_only_no_remote_backend_configured; providers.tf comment states state is snapshotted to Vaultwarden; no .tfstate or backend.tf files present in iac/
recommended_state_backend: S3 with DynamoDB lock table (or Terraform Cloud free tier) for collaborative state, with Vaultwarden as the secrets-vault bootstrap. Concrete recommendation: add an aws/ backend block using a dedicated s3://phenotype-infra-tfstate bucket with dynamodb_table=phenotype-tflock in us-east-1; fall back to local-only if the bootstrap AWS account is unavailable.
